spec.name: zlib_compress_to_hex
spec.description: Read a file as raw bytes, compress with zlib, and write lowercase hex of compressed bytes to an output text file.
spec.implementation_notes: Open input_path in binary mode, compress bytes with zlib.compress, hex-encode with bytes.hex(), write text to output_path.

request.rationale: Available tools only read and write text files; the objective requires byte-accurate zlib compression of raw file bytes, which I cannot reliably perform without a binary-capable compression tool.
